features: Sheet face masks properties: moisturizing, nourishing, increasing firmness and elasticity, restoring, softening, smoothing. They work for all skin types: oily, dry, combination, sensitive skin

Perfect beauty gift set for women: Beautifully packaged calendar is an ideal beauty gift for mother, girlfriend or daughter on any occasion. Show your care and appreciation with this skin care gift. + 1 mask free

One with a willow tree and cocoa beans, 2 - with melon pulp and mint, 3 - with white tea and pear, 4 - with blueberries and peony, 5 - with coconut water and lychee, 6 - with blood orange and papaya, 7 - with blue agave and lotus
description: Product Description Gift Set of Face Masks BEAUTY WEEK Your Beauty Calendar has just started! Wanna be a babe with smooth face skin who just walked out of glossy expensive magazine? Use Gift set 7DAYS Sheet Face Masks and get your perfectly even skin tone and silky soft flawless skin just in 7 days! WOW-EFFECT: 7DAYS Beauty Calendar Masks Set is a great choice for everyday skin care. It will be a great present for your skin, an excellent and unique gift for mum, sister, granny, best friend on Christmas, New Year, Mothers Day, Birthday and for any occasion of the week! The 8th mask in each set is for FREE! Reasons to fall in love with it: Easy and quick 20 mins skin care Pamper gift for ultimate relaxation Beautiful package & handy format Skin cleansing & energy boosting 100% Paraben Free Monday & Tuesday №1 DYNAMIC MONDAY face mask after a long day's work The Monday mask is the first step in your journey to the skin of your dreams! Willow extract gently cleanses, evens skin tone and minimizes pores. Hyaluronic acid and a unique moisturizing complex boost elasticity. Cocoa beans are full of compounds that soften and nourish the skin, making it soft and velvety. №2 CHEERFUL TUESDAY face mask against low spirits Melon accelerates skin regeneration, evens tone and protects against harmful environmental factors. Mint extract refreshes, cools and nourishes your skin. Its unique vitamin complex fills your skin with energy, evens texture and gives it the shade you’ve been looking for. Wednesday & Thursday №3 EASY WEDNESDAY face mask while you watch your favorite show Green tea extract provides intense hydration, improves elasticity and fills your skin with youthful energy. Shea, macadamia and jojoba oils revitalize your skin with nourishing ingredients to make it soft and smooth. Pear softens the upper layers of the epidermis, accelerates regeneration and refreshes the skin. Hyaluronic acid and a unique moisturizing complex give your skin an elastic bounce. №4 ACTIVE THURSDAY face mask after sports Peony extract restores elasticity, deeply moisturizes and softens skin. Blueberry enhances your skin’s protective barrier and nourishes it with vitamins. Shea, macadamia and jojoba oils revitalize your skin with nourishing ingredients to make it soft and smooth. Hyaluronic acid penetrates deep into skin to moisturize it from the inside. Friday & Saturday №4 BLAZING FRIDAY face mask for your pre-party prep routine Coconut water has deep regenerating effects. Lychee extract recharges your skin with vital energy while also toning and removing signs of fatigue for a healthy glow. Its unique vitamin complex fills your skin with energy, evens texture and gives it the shade you’ve been looking for. Hyaluronic acid provides intense hydration for a youthful, elastic bounce. №5 ROMANTIC SATURDAY face mask to get ready for your date The Saturday mask eliminates the signs of fatigue. Blood Orange improves elasticity and moisturizes. Papaya makes your skin fresh and radiant – its enzymes moisturize and tone your skin to perfection. Its unique vitamin complex fills your skin with energy, evens texture and gives it the shade you’ve been looking for. Sunday №4 PERFECT SUNDAY face mask for total relaxation Sunday was made for relaxation! The Sunday day mask is the final step in your journey to the skin of your dreams! Blue agave restores freshness, hydrates and smoothes your skin. Lotus cleanses, stimulates and refreshes. Shea, macadamia and jojoba oils revitalize your skin with nourishing ingredients to make it soft and smooth. WHAT ACTIVE INGREDIENTS ARE IN THE MASKS? Shea Butter deeply nourishes & shields from damage Collagen tightens the skin & reduces appearance of wrinkles Argan Oil boosts moisture levels & improves complexion Hyaluronic Acid enhances suppleness & boosts elasticity Cocoa Bean strengthens skin barrier & locks in moisture Macadamia Oil regenerates the skin & balances sebum production Fruit Extracts restore energy & promote skin vibrance Herbal Extracts reduce skin redness & irritation WHAT MAKES OUR MASKS UNIQUE? SUPERFOOD & HEALTHY OILS & VITAMIN COMPLEX х2 SERUM FOR EXTRA MOISTURIZING AND NUTRITION PARABEN FREE & CRUELTY FREE & NOT TESTED ON ANIMALS HOW TO USE Сlean your face Apply mask to face and leave for 10-15 minutes. While you’re waiting, take a selfie and post it to INSTAGRAM After removing the mask, massage your face Remove any remaining residue with a makeup remover towelette and rinse face with water
